steps.description: Use main to generate initial TS guess structure
steps.success_criteria: A plausible TS guess XYZ is generated

steps.description: Generate Gaussian keywords and route section for TS search in acetone solvent
steps.success_criteria: A valid TS route section is generated
steps.error_handling_hint: Revise functional, basis, solvent, or TS settings

steps.description: Convert XYZ plus route section into Gaussian input
steps.error_handling_hint: Check format conversion and route insertion

steps.description: Run Gaussian TS optimization and frequency analysis
steps.expected_outputs: TS result with one imaginary frequency
steps.success_criteria: Normal termination and exactly one imaginary frequency
steps.error_handling_hint: Adjust TS keywords or improve initial guess

calculation_context.scientific_question: Find a plausible TS and validate it
validation_plan: IRC when pathway verification is required
